title: Modeling CAR-T cell therapy on-chip
summary: Develops an organ-on-chip platform for modeling CAR-T cell therapy, enabling real-time assessment of engineered T-cell interactions with target tumors in a controlled microfluidic environment. This approach offers a translatable preclinical screening system that could accelerate CAR-T optimization and improve patient stratification.

title: A framework for building a synthetic cell
summary: The SynCell Asia Initiative proposes a strategy to build living cells from scratch by orchestrating the spatiotemporal integration of core functional modules through a centralized AI-driven biofoundry. This framework targets a longstanding bottleneck in synthetic biology that has persisted despite decades of progress.

title: Broad-spectrum Ebola vaccine
summary: Reports on a broad-spectrum vaccine candidate targeting multiple Ebola virus strains, advancing the field of pan-filovirus immunization. This development has significant implications for pandemic preparedness and outbreak response in endemic regions.
